title: Eva art cells
wikitext:
[]: Eva art cells ?             Quote Post by halid84 » Sat Jul 11, 2009 5:12 am Just curious if anybody here has managed to pick up any official production cells from the series at all. If so how much did you pay and where did you get them from? I am really interested in getting one and have been looking around. Very scarce, apparently gainax have not released the production cells to the public. Only a few have gotten out and those were ones that were given to the staff who probably sold them. So yeh if anyone can help point in the right direction, much appreciated

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Sat Jul 11, 2009 7:06 am Well there was a Kawuro art cell on ebay a little while ago though it was $2,400 lol. I think there might have been some other ones on ebay for less awhile ago so you might want to check there.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 11, 2009 8:51 am My understanding is that the cels were all out and floating around. I thought this was why they didn't just reshoot the animation for Renewal. I don't have a source that confirms this, however one of the Platinum/Renewal Booklets does state that animation was shot from "repainted cels". http://www.evamonkey.com/platinum_vol4_introduction.htm Does this mean they are reproductions? They would have to be, because I can't understand how you would go about retouching animation cells. I've not seen much in the way of animations cels from Evangelion. But then again, I honestly don't care to look around. Good cells are an expensive luxury that I can't engage in, not to mention that I would be too skeptic of the authenticity.

[]:             Quote Post by halid84 » Sat Jul 11, 2009 9:21 am According to what i have read, they havent released the production cells. What gainax did do was release re-production cells, i forget the name they called them. But i have seen differant cells at various websites, which have been sold by the way. And yes i saw the kaworu one on ebay, and i think thats a bit too expensive for me haha. I found this one of Asuka http://cgi.ebay.com.au/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-cellulo-original-anime-Cel-NGE_W0QQitemZ160347003225QQcmdZViewItemQQptZFR_JG_Livres_BD_Mangas?hash=item25556d1959&_trksid=p3286.c0.m14&_trkparms=65%3A1%7C66%3A2%7C39%3A1%7C293%3A4%7C294%3A50 I asked the seller if it was authentic to which he claims he bought them while he was in Japan and that they are genuine. What you guys think ?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jul 11, 2009 9:35 am even if cells don't get released they get stolen sometimes Y!J auction category has both production ones, official reproductions, and some random bootleg shit: http://list5.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/2084034853-category-leaf.html?alocale=0jp&apg=1&s1=cbids&o1=d&mode=1 sorted by price because it basically puts the real ones first

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 11, 2009 10:25 am halid84 wrote: I asked the seller if it was authentic to which he claims he bought them while he was in Japan and that they are genuine. What you guys think ?

[]:             Quote Post by halid84 » Sat Jul 11, 2009 11:18 pm ^ Yeah i totally agree with what you saying. I thought i'd have a look around to see if was possible to get my hands on the genuine thing at a decent price. IMO paying around $400 for a genuine production cell would be fair and i would be willing to pay for. But i think anywhere above that would be no-go zone, which unfortunately would probably be the case. That and the danger of buying something (like you mentioned) was not done by the staff of Eva. Oh well, ill still have a look on ebay every now and again. Who knows, could find something sooner or later.
